name: @canopy/oidc-session-rn
description: Solid OIDC sign-in for React Native — OidcSessionRN (token persistence + bearer fetch + refresh), runOidcSignIn (expo-auth-session + PKCE), and DCR helpers. Lifted from apps/folio-mobile 2026-05-08 (Stoop V3 Phase 40.3). Slated to migrate to the unified Inrupt-cleanup substrate when that lands.
